quick_skim.title: Power-Budgeted Underwater Vehicle Control via Constrained Reinforcement Learning
quick_skim.abstract: Underwater vehicles operate from a fixed onboard energy budget that propulsion rapidly depletes, so a controller that completes its task while drawing less thruster power directly extends mission range and endurance. Reinforcement learning yields capable model-free controllers for station-keeping and trajectory tracking, but optimizing task accuracy alone drives the policy toward oscillatory, energy-wasting actuation. The established remedy subtracts an energy penalty from the reward, yet this sets the task-power trade-off through a single weight with no physical units: a target power level cannot be specified, the weight must be re-tuned for every vehicle and task, and a mismatched weight can even raise power. This paper instead formulates energy-efficient underwater control as a constrained Markov decision process in which average thruster power is subject to an explicit budget, solved with a PPO-Lagrangian algorithm. The power level is set by declaring a budget in physical units, and a single dual variable is updated online to meet it for each vehicle and task, without manual weight search. Across three vehicles and four tasks in the MarineGym simulator, the energy-constrained policy draws the least power in all twelve settings, reducing it by 14--65\% (up to 64.9\%) over a task-only baseline and below an energy-reward baseline everywhere, while remaining the smoothest in ten settings and preserving task accuracy except in one deliberately power-limited regime. Imposing energy as an explicit constraint thus offers a tuning-free route to energy-efficient underwater control that needs no per-vehicle, per-task weight search.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Constrained RL for power management in autonomous vehicles to extend mission endurance, applicable to UAV power management
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用约束强化学习进行自主航行器功率管理以延长任务时间，可直接应用于无人机功率管理
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用约束强化学习进行自主航行器功率管理以延长任务时间，可直接应用于无人机功率管理
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用约束强化学习进行自主航行器功率管理以延长任务时间，可直接应用于无人机功率管理
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Addresses the problem of minimizing thruster power in underwater vehicles using constrained RL, formulating power limits as constraints instead of penalties, enabling direct power budget control and improved energy efficiency; the method is transferable to UAV energy management.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对水下航行器固定能量预算下推进功率快速消耗的问题，本文提出基于约束强化学习的控制器，将功率预算转化为硬约束而非奖励惩罚，直接从物理单位设定功率上限，避免手动调权，从而在保持任务精度的同时降低推进功耗。该方法为无人机功率管理中的节能控制提供了新思路。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对水下航行器固定能量预算下推进功率快速消耗的问题，本文提出基于约束强化学习的控制器，将功率预算转化为硬约束而非奖励惩罚，直接从物理单位设定功率上限，避免手动调权，从而在保持任务精度的同时降低推进功耗。该方法为无人机功率管理中的节能控制提供了新思路。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 查找关于混合动力无人机和混合电推垂直起降飞行器能量管理策略的综述论文和代表性研究。重点关注串联混合动力无人机、燃料电池/电池混合动力无人机、内燃机-发电机/电池混合动力无人机和混合电推垂直起降飞行器。总结主要的能量管理方法，包括基于规则控制、模糊逻辑控制、等效消耗最小化策略、自适应等效消耗最小化策略、动态规划、庞特里亚金极小值原理、模型预测控制和强化学习。优先考虑讨论系统建模、基于任务剖面的功率分配、电池荷电状态维持控制、降低油耗、发电机瞬态抑制、电池老化、实时实现以及实验或硬件验证的论文。识别当前局限性和潜在研究空白，以支持混合动力无人机能量管理的未来创新。, especially work that connects or combines: UAV power management; fuel cell battery UAV; hybrid-electric propulsion; energy management strategy for hybrid electric unmanned aerial vehicles; | English keyword            | 中文含义       | | -------------------------- | ---------- | | hybrid-powered UAV         | 混合动力无人机    | | energy management strategy | 能量管理策略     | | hybrid-electric propulsion | 混合电推进      | | series hybrid UAV          | 串联混动无人机    | | fuel cell battery UAV      | 燃料电池/电池无人机 | | UAV power management       | 无人机功率管理    |; equivalent consumption minimization strategy for hybrid electric vehicles; Which papers provide a clear taxonomy of rule based, fuzzy, ECMS, dynamic programming, PMP, MPC, and reinforcement learning methods?; What are the unsolved problems in hybrid UAV energy management, such as SOC control, fuel consumption, generator transients, and mission adaptation?; What are the main categories of energy management strategies for hybrid powered UAVs?; What are the current limitations and research gaps in hybrid UAV energy management?.

quick_skim.title: TurboMPC: Fast, Scalable, and Differentiable Model Predictive Control on the GPU
quick_skim.abstract: Robotics increasingly relies on GPUs for parallel simulation, large-scale learning, and neural-network inference. For model predictive control (MPC) to scale with this paradigm, solvers must run efficiently on this hardware while remaining fast, differentiable, and compatible with expressive MPC formulations used in robotics. We present TurboMPC, a differentiable MPC solver that runs entirely on the GPU and supports state and control inequality constraints, implicit integrators, cross-time-coupled costs, and slack variables. TurboMPC combines sequential quadratic programming (SQP), an alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) inner solver, implicit differentiation, and a co-designed JAX-CUDA implementation for efficiency and ease of use. In simulation, we validate TurboMPC on constrained planning, humanoid imitation learning, and reinforcement learning with neural-network cost function tasks, achieving up to $15\times$ and $58\times$ speedups over state-of-the-art CPU and GPU differentiable solvers, respectively. We deploy TurboMPC on a full-scale car for minimum-time racing and find that batched, GPU-accelerated tuning of MPC parameters via Bayesian optimization yields significantly faster driving than a hand-tuned baseline. TurboMPC also scales to planning horizons of over $8000$ knot points while maintaining control of the vehicle. We open-source TurboMPC at: https://github.com/ToyotaResearchInstitute/turbompc
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Provides fast GPU-based MPC solver; MPC is a key method for UAV energy management
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 提供快速GPU-based MPC求解器；MPC是无人机能量管理的关键方法
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 提供快速GPU-based MPC求解器；MPC是无人机能量管理的关键方法
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 提供快速GPU-based MPC求解器；MPC是无人机能量管理的关键方法
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: TurboMPC is a differentiable MPC solver on GPUs, enabling fast and scalable MPC for robotics; its techniques can be adapted for real-time energy management in hybrid UAVs.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对机器人领域模型预测控制(MPC)计算效率问题，本文提出完全在GPU上运行的TurboMPC求解器，支持状态与控制约束、隐式积分和跨时步耦合代价，结合序列二次规划、交替方向乘子法内求解器及JAX-CUDA协同设计，实现快速可微分MPC。该方法可潜在应用于混合动力无人机能量管理的实时优化。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对机器人领域模型预测控制(MPC)计算效率问题，本文提出完全在GPU上运行的TurboMPC求解器，支持状态与控制约束、隐式积分和跨时步耦合代价，结合序列二次规划、交替方向乘子法内求解器及JAX-CUDA协同设计，实现快速可微分MPC。该方法可潜在应用于混合动力无人机能量管理的实时优化。
